title: The Villagers Lower Their Weapons
description: On pages 9–12, the villagers lower their weapons as the Straw Hats reach Drum Island, but the armed villagers fear pirates and refuse to welcome them until Vivi pleads for Nami’s life.
scene: The Villagers Lower Their Weapons. The Straw Hats reach Drum Island, but the armed villagers fear pirates and refuse to welcome them until Vivi pleads for Nami’s life. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Wow... just what are those mountains...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So much snow...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm so happy...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Aren't you cold wearing only that?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: It's -10 degrees, cold enough for a bear to begin hiberrating.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: BRRRR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could you be any slower!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Shiver Shiver

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A Meltwater Waterfall...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We should be able to dock our ship around here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So...? Who's going to go look for a doctor?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Actually... I guess we should start by seeing if there are even any people.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'll go!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: me too!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Yes, go forth, my comrades!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stop right there,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, there're people.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Uhh... judging from the mood, this doesn't look so good...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: You will turn around immediately,

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: and leave this island at once.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Wait! We've come here for a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We have a sick person on board!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Those lies won't work on us, pirate-scum!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is our country and we won't let no stinking pirates run amok on it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Now pull your anchor back up and beat it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Or else we'll make you leave!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Whoo... talk about a bad first impression...

summary: This part centers on the villagers lower their weapons, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
